Home › Brevard County › Rockledge › Top-Rated & Safe

Top-Rated, Health-Safe Restaurants in Rockledge

Clean kitchen, happy room — and these 12 Rockledge restaurants pull off both at once. Every one clears an A health grade on top of strong diner ratings. MY ISLAND PANCAKE HOUSE tops the room at 4.6 stars.

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

  • A 100 M
    MY ISLAND PANCAKE HOUSE American ★ 4.6 (2233) Rockledge · Brevard County Healthy Inspected Mar 2026
  • A 98 L
    LELLO'S RISTORANTE AND PIZZERIA Italian ★ 4.6 (978) Rockledge · Brevard County VegHealthy Inspected Feb 2026
  • A 98 L
    LONG DOGGERS American ★ 4.5 (2360) Rockledge · Brevard County VeganVeg +1 more Inspected Jan 2026
  • A 98 C
    COUNTRY COOKIN' DINER Other ★ 4.5 (1083) Rockledge · Brevard County Healthy Inspected Jan 2026
  • A 92 R
    RIVER ROCKS LLC Seafood ★ 4.4 (3002) Rockledge · Brevard County VegGF +6 more Inspected Mar 2026
  • A 92 P
    PINEDA INN BAR & GRILL American ★ 4.4 (1829) Rockledge · Brevard County Keto Inspected May 2026
  • A 94 K
    KELSEYS PIZZERIA Pizza ★ 4.3 (901) Rockledge · Brevard County Veg Inspected Mar 2026
  • A 93 R
    RUBY TUESDAY #7171 American ★ 4.2 (2905) Rockledge · Brevard County VegKeto +1 more Inspected Dec 2025
  • A 100 M
    MCDONALD'S 18992 Other ★ 3.5 (1051) Rockledge · Brevard County Inspected Aug 2025
  • A 99 W
    WENDYS 8452 Other ★ 3.5 (899) Rockledge · Brevard County Keto Inspected Nov 2025
  • A 92 M
    MCDONALD'S #7451 Other ★ 3.4 (1577) Rockledge · Brevard County Inspected Aug 2025
  • A 100 M
    MCDONALD'S #34356 Other ★ 3.4 (1378) Rockledge · Brevard County Inspected Aug 2025
